name: Meat-ze-Pie Dot Bartlett
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheddar cheese, sharp and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground meat with milk, bread crumbs, and garlic powder.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Spread tomato paste over the meat.
4. (Optional) Place pepperoni on top of the tomato paste.
5. Top with shredded Cheddar cheese (or mozzarella), sprinkle with oregano, then grate Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 25 minutes.
